generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations within AGREE clauses.
Move guarantees referencing implementation-level details to the implementation annex.
Avoid range comparisons or equality checks on Boolean or opaque data types unless a numeric scalar representation is explicitly defined.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Ensure AGREE expressions use only visible AADL features or declared helpers.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce unqualified identifiers or data types not present in the AADL model.
Avoid attempting to repair invalid clauses by modifying the underlying architecture.
